mapper.sql: id, conversation_id, agent_name, user_id, tag_type, tag_name, tag_value, confidence, weight, metadata, created_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO session_tags (conversation_id, agent_name, user_id, tag_type, tag_name, tag_value, confidence, weight, metadata, created_at) VALUES (#{conversationId}, #{agentName}, #{userId}, #{tagType}, #{tagName}, #{tagValue}, #{confidence}, #{weight}, #{metadata}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE tag_type = VALUES(tag_type), tag_name = VALUES(tag_name), tag_value = VALUES(tag_value), confidence = VALUES(confidence), weight = VALUES(weight), metadata = VALUES(metadata)

INSERT INTO session_tags (conversation_id, agent_name, user_id, tag_type, tag_name, tag_value, confidence, weight, metadata, created_at) VALUES
(#{tag.conversationId}, #{tag.agentName}, #{tag.userId}, #{tag.tagType}, #{tag.tagName}, #{tag.tagValue}, #{tag.confidence}, #{tag.weight}, #{tag.metadata}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT FROM session_tags WHERE user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY weight DESC, created_at DESC
SELECT FROM session_tags WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND agent_name = #{agentName} ORDER BY weight DESC, created_at DESC
mapper.delete:
DELETE FROM session_tags WHERE conversation_id IN
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT FROM session_tags WHERE MATCH(tag_name, tag_value) AGAINST(#{query} IN NATURAL LANGUAGE MODE) ORDER BY weight DESC, created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
mapper.update: CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS session_tags ( id BIGINT AUTO_INCREMENT PRIMARY KEY COMMENT '标签ID', conversation_id VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT '会话ID', agent_name VARCHAR(100) NOT NULL COMMENT 'Agent名称', user_id VARCHAR(100) COMMENT '用户ID', tag_type VARCHAR(50) NOT NULL COMMENT '标签类型：topic, domain, sentiment, custom', tag_name VARCHAR(200) NOT NULL COMMENT '标签名称', tag_value TEXT COMMENT '标签值/描述', confidence DOUBLE DEFAULT 0.0 COMMENT '置信度（0-1）', weight INT DEFAULT 0 COMMENT '权重（用于排序）', metadata JSON COMMENT '额外元数据', created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP COMMENT '创建时间', INDEX idx_conversation_id (conversation_id), INDEX idx_user_id (user_id), INDEX idx_agent_name (agent_name), INDEX idx_tag_type (tag_type), FULLTEXT INDEX ft_tag_name_value (tag_name, tag_value) WITH PARSER ngram ) ENGINE=InnoDB DEFAULT CHARSET=utf8mb4 COLLATE=utf8mb4_unicode_ci COMMENT='会话标签表'
